inline_comments.message: By adding these fields here, you've changed every DCAE microservice model that derivces from onap.policies.Monitoring. Vijay are you sure you want this done?

I believe this file is consolidated representation of policy definition. I see the actual policy datatype/policytype was updated under this submission - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/sdc/+/92559/

Vidyashree - Can you clarify how this file was created? If  added for reference purpose, possibly the same datatype/policytype can be added here.
It is created using tosca-lab policy_create.py script. It is for reference. I have upload new patch by modifying onap.policies.Monitoring same as consolidated policyTypes.yaml in sdc.
